mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report ( user_id, obj_id, obj_type, reason, status_code, created_at ) VALUES ( #{user_id}, #{objId}, #{objType}, #{reason}, #{status_code}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM report WHERE report_id = #{report_id} AND is_deleted = 'N'
SELECT * FROM report WHERE is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY report_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE report SET status_code = #{status_code}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE report_id = #{report_id}
UPDATE report SET is_deleted = 'Y', deleted_at = NOW() WHERE report_id = #{report_id}
